message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to merge stream and distributed trace

Standardize code formatting across two modules:

merge.rs:
- Compact the Vec initialization in merge_size_hint_unknown_upper test
  from 4 lines to 2 lines while maintaining readability

distributed/mod.rs:
- Reorder pub use statements alphabetically (crdt before id)
- Maintains consistent import ordering convention used elsewhere

These are pure formatting changes with no functional impact, applied
to improve consistency with the project's rustfmt configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
